landing.title: The Ultimate Web Application for Utilities
landing.subtitle: Agung Tools is a powerful all-in-one web application designed for developers and creatives. Instantly convert text/numbers to binary, encode to Base64/Hex, and deeply analyze EXIF metadata right in your browser.
landing.feat1Desc: Extract hidden EXIF GPS coordinates, camera models, and deep file properties from your images. Fully local and private.
landing.feat2Desc: Convert Text to Binary, Number to Binary, Base64 encode/decode, Hex converters, and even translate Morse Code in a blazing-fast UI.
landing.feat3Desc: Security by design. No files or conversions are ever uploaded to a server. Everything runs efficiently in your browser.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure Agung Tools to your preferences

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: All file processing happens locally in your browser
privacy.privacyModeDesc: Shows a visual indicator that processing is local-only

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.darkModeDesc: Use dark theme for better visibility in low light

metadata.title: Metadata View
metadata.rawViewDesc: Show raw JSON metadata instead of structured view

data.title: Data Management
data.subtitle: Manage your local data and export settings

about.title: About Agung Tools
about.desc: Agung Tools is a powerful utility platform designed to help developers, photographers, and internet users accomplish their daily tasks seamlessly.

steganography.title: Image Steganography
steganography.subtitle: Hide & extract secret messages inside images, AES-256 encrypted
steganography.privacyNotice: All image processing and encryption happens entirely in your browser using the Canvas API and Web Crypto API. No image, message, or key is ever transmitted to a server.

encode.title: Encode: Hide a Secret Message
encode.secretMessagePlaceholder: Type the secret message to hide inside the image...
encode.successPng: Saved as lossless PNG to preserve hidden bits
encode.successLocal: All processing done locally - no data was uploaded
encode.dropLabel: Drop image here or click to browse
encode.dropSublabel: PNG, JPG, WEBP supported • Output always saved as PNG
encode.jpegWarning: JPEG detected - output will be saved as PNG to preserve hidden data.

decode.title: Decode - Extract Hidden Message
decode.dropLabel: Drop encoded image here or click to browse
decode.dropSublabel: Upload the image that contains the hidden message
decode.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank if no password was used...
decode.autoDesc: Auto tries all strengths. Select manually if you know the encoding used.
decode.needPassword: This message is password-protected. Please enter the password.

analyze.title: Analyze: Detect Hidden Data
analyze.dropSublabel: Chi-square LSB analysis to detect hidden data
analyze.how3: High uniformity → higher probability of hidden data
analyze.how4: Natural images have irregular LSB patterns
analyze.how5: Some false positives possible on edited/synthetic images
analyze.disclaimer: ⚠ Statistical analysis only. Results are probabilistic and not conclusive proof of steganography.

footer.lsbDesc: Modifies the least significant bits of pixel RGB channels - changes invisible to the human eye.
footer.aesDesc: Optional military-grade encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation before embedding.
footer.chiDesc: Statistical analysis comparing LSB distributions to detect anomalies from natural images.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to Agung Tools. The ultimate platform for utilities.
dashboard.noFilesHint: Upload a file to inspect its hidden metadata

batch.title: Batch Analyzer
batch.subtitle: Analyze multiple files and compare metadata
batch.orSelect: or click to select multiple files
batch.noFilesHint: Upload multiple files to compare their metadata

upload.title: Upload & Analyze
upload.subtitle: Drag & drop, paste, or select files to extract metadata
upload.dropHere: Drop files here or click to upload
upload.supports: Supports JPG, PNG, HEIC, MP4, MOV, and more
upload.pasteHint: Tip: You can also paste images from clipboard (Ctrl+V)
upload.invalidFile: No valid files selected. Please upload images, videos, or audio files.
upload.failedProcess: Failed to process file. Please try again.

tools.title: DevTools Lab
tools.subtitle: Encoding, decoding, and conversion utilities
tools.selectHint: Select a tool to get started
tools.selectHintSub: Click on any tool card above to open it
